name: @spectra/performance
description: k6 performance tests (load, stress, breakpoint, soak). k6 is a system CLI — see README.

scripts.docker:inspect: docker compose run --rm k6 inspect src/scenarios/load.ts
scripts.docker:smoke: docker compose run --rm k6 run src/scenarios/smoke.ts
scripts.docker:load: docker compose run --rm k6 run src/scenarios/load.ts
scripts.docker:load:influx: docker compose run --rm k6 run --out influxdb=http://influxdb:8086/k6 src/scenarios/load.ts
